LanguageData.AEXP_Otter.description: Long, slim, semi-aquatic mammal dieting mostly on fish and small plants. They are extremaly good swimmers and can hold breath under water for a prolonged amount of time.
LanguageData.AEXP_Otter.label: otter
LanguageData.AEXP_Otter.tools.0.label: left claw
LanguageData.AEXP_Otter.tools.1.label: right claw
LanguageData.AEXP_Otter.tools.3.label: head
